entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A cereal crop used to estimate nitrogenase activity in pot-grown plants.

entities.name: MILLET
entities.description: A cereal crop used to estimate nitrogenase activity in pot-grown plants.

entities.name: NITROGENASE ACTIVITY
entities.description: The biological activity of the nitrogenase enzyme, measured by C2H2 reduction.

entities.name: PLANT GROWTH
entities.description: The physical development and growth of the plants.

entities.name: INTACT PLANT ASSAY
entities.description: A non-destructive assay for estimating nitrogenase activity in pot-grown plants.

entities.name: C2H2 REDUCTION
entities.description: The chemical reduction of acetylene used as a proxy for nitrogenase activity.

entities.name: INCUBATION
entities.description: The process of maintaining plants under specific conditions for a set time to measure activity.

entities.name: FARMYARD MANURE
entities.description: An organic amendment used in the growth medium to improve nitrogenase activity and growth.

entities.name: SAND
entities.description: A growth medium component used alone or in combination with other materials.

entities.name: VERMICULITE
entities.description: A growth medium used for comparison in the study.

entities.name: SOIL
entities.description: A growth medium used for comparison in the study.

entities.name: TEMPERATURE
entities.description: The environmental temperature during incubation, affecting nitrogenase activity.

entities.name: SOIL MOISTURE
entities.description: The amount of water in the growth medium, which influences nitrogenase activity.
